flags.message: Snapshot is metadata-only: no docket entries, no parties/attorneys, no filing or decision dates, and no originating-court info. The prediction rests entirely on structural signals (miscellaneous-docket number '33, Misc', prisoner-v-custodian caption) plus corpus base rates, not on the petition's contents. If richer docket text exists upstream, provisioning it would materially improve predictions for this class of old SCOTUS misc-docket cases.
